top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks to slump as Middle East strikes dim peace hopes
top_signals.summary: Good morning and welcome back to the City AM liveblog. An exchange of fire from Iran and Israel has left markets returning from the weekend with little hope a fully-fledged peace deal with the US could be on the horizon. The Israel Defence Forces (IDF) said it had fired strikes at military targets in western and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Social media bans on teens risk strengthening Big Tech's grip on the sector, Bluesky exec warns
top_signals.summary: "We're living in a world where it's almost impossible for smaller entrants to come in and build healthier spaces," Bluesky's COO, Rose Wang, told CNBC.
